description_long: This object is a cylindrical, dark-colored shotgun shell with a slightly textured surface, featuring metallic gold bands with ornate patterns near each end. The main body appears to be made of a matte, dark brown or black material, likely a type of plastic or paper, while the ends are capped with metallic components. The gold bands are decorative and add a touch of detail, suggesting a premium or specialized shell. The ends are flat, with one end showing a central primer, typical of shotgun ammunition. The overall form is compact and robust, designed for use in a shotgun.
description: A dark, cylindrical shotgun shell with gold decorative bands and metallic end caps, featuring a central primer on one end.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shell, with gold bands and a textured dark body.
description_view_1: End view displaying the metallic cap and central primer, with the gold band encircling the edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, highlighting the shell's cylindrical shape and gold detailing.
description_view_3: End view mirroring view 1, showing the metallic cap and primer from the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: Not applicable; this is a shotgun shell, not a shotgun barrel.
attribute_stock_type: Not applicable; this is a shotgun shell, not a shotgun stock.
attribute_action_mechanism: Not applicable; this is a shotgun shell, not a shotgun action.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Not applicable; this is a shotgun shell, not a shotgun trigger guard.
